data.title_zh: 角号 / 定义 / 颜色 / 线径
data.content:
角号 PIN定义 FUNCTION颜色 COLOR线径 WIRE GAGE
1U相 MOTOR U黄 YELLOW
2V相 MOTOR V红 RED18AWG
3W相 MOTOR W黑 BLACK
4PE相 MOTOR PE=黄绿 YELLOW/GREEN
data.content_en:
Pin PINFunction FUNCTIONColor COLORWire Gage WIRE GAGE
1U Phase MOTOR UYELLOW
2V Phase MOTOR VRED18AWG
3W Phase MOTOR WBLACK
4PE Phase MOTOR PE=Yellow/Green YELLOW/GREEN
